rules.name: Command and Control Beacon to Suspicious IP
rules.author: Microsoft Security
rules.content:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Palo Alto Networks"
| where DestinationPort in (443, 8443)
| summarize Beacons = count() by SourceIP, DestinationIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where Beacons > 100

rules.name: Encoded PowerShell Execution
rules.author: Microsoft Security
rules.content:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4688
| where NewProcessName endswith "powershell.exe"
| where CommandLine has_any ("-enc", "-EncodedCommand", "FromBase64String")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, CommandLine
